Here's a fast Frankie fact for you. When you're trying to pick out which screws are right for your deck, you use the rule of two. If your wood is an inch and a half thick, you get a three inch screw. Now every deck is going to need footings and there's a variety of options available to you guys. The most important thing you can do is check your local codes to find out what you need.
